drifted.spec_text: Include shape definitions in state streams only on first use
drifted.actual: All registered shapes included in every state stream update

drifted.spec_text: Render each shape type with geometry that visually matches the physics collider dimensions
drifted.actual: Triangle, Compound, and Mesh shapes render as placeholder spheres instead of accurate geometry

drifted.spec_text: Users MUST be able to set the position and velocity of kinematic bodies directly
drifted.actual: Position/velocity only settable at creation time via AddBody; no runtime update RPC exists

drifted.spec_text: All new features accessible through REPL commands, MCP tools, scripting library
drifted.actual: Core features accessible; scripting library has 4/10 constraint convenience builders; SC-009 (30 FPS benchmark) not validated

recommendations: Add SetBodyPose command for runtime kinematic body repositioning (FR-030)
Implement custom MeshDraw for Triangle, Compound, Mesh shapes in ShapeGeometry (FR-007)
Consider per-subscriber shape cache tracking for bandwidth optimization (FR-006b)
Add convenience builders for remaining 6 constraint types in Scripting library (SC-008)
